title: Taepalae
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Taepalae1.jpg]] |name=Taepalae |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=Black |feathers= |eyes=Light Green |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Are you going back for him?''"
"''Are you kidding? Course we aren't! He's on his own. I only wish he didn't have the salvage on him.|Meetra Surik and Taepalae|''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''}} '''Taepalae''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] and the leader of a small group of salvagers on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. She met [[Meetra Surik]] near the ruined [[Jedi Enclave]] after one of her companions, [[Jorran]], had been trapped in a room after they all had been attacked by [[laigrek]]s, forcing all but Jorran to leave the Enclave. When Surik rescued Jorran, Taepalae recommended Surik accept a reward the next time she saved someone's life. ==Behind the scenes== The Jedi Exile might provoke Taepalae and her companions to a fight by insulting them during the conversation of their first encounter. This results in a dark side shift for the Exile. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Taepalae#legends |fr=Taepalae |pl=Taepalae }} [[Category:Dantooinians]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Scavengers]]
